history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A group of four young adults, two men and two women, are taking a selfie in a dimly lit, stylish indoor setting. The person in the foreground, a man with a wide, beaming smile, is wearing a black t-shirt and dark-rimmed glasses that reflect the faces of the other people in the group. To his right, a woman with long brown hair is making a playful "peace" sign with her fingers near her forehead and sticking out her tongue. Behind her, another man with dark hair is looking towards the camera with a slight smile. On the far left, a man wearing a white cap and orange-tinted glasses is also looking at the camera, with a white and dark striped collared shirt. The background suggests a bar or lounge area, with green walls, dark tables, red chairs with ornate designs, and a checkered floor pattern visible in the distance. The lighting is warm and moody, with a slight golden hue, creating an intimate and jovial atmosphere. The overall style is casual yet sophisticated, capturing a moment of fun and friendship.
